title: Customer Segmentation using Sentiment Analysis
scenario: Develop a prompt to classify customer reviews into three sentiment categories: positive, neutral, and negative. The classification should be based on specific phrases and keywords within each review. Assume the reviews are in plain text format and contain a mix of informal and formal language. The target LLM output should be a Python list with three sublists containing the classified reviews.
constraints: Must use a Python-based sentiment analysis library such as vaderSentiment
Must include a brief explanation of the sentiment analysis approach used

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt satisfies the constraints provided
Verify the accuracy of the sentiment classification results using a testing dataset
Assess the clarity and conciseness of the prompt's explanation
